ch0304_41_aoki/0101_0701_02_10: I’m thinking of recharging at the hot springs.
ch0304_41_aoki/7101_0701_01_10:
Both people and Pokémon need somewhere
to rest and unwind.
ch0304_41_aoki/7101_0701_02_10:
Nothing beats the relief of being home,
but spending time at a tourist spot isn’t bad.
ch0304_41_aoki/7102_0701_01_10:
The best part of any travel destination is the
local food.
ch0304_41_aoki/7102_0701_02_10: But I also enjoy another part.
ch0304_41_aoki/7102_0701_03_10:
Whenever I return from a trip, I have a
renewed appreciation for my usual simpler
meals.
ch0304_41_aoki/7103_0701_01_10:
Do you like my outfit? Personally, I like how
comfortable it is.
ch0304_41_aoki/7103_0701_02_10:
Above all, I like that it’s simple and
straightforward.
ch0304_41_aoki/7104_0701_01_10:
Pasio is a rare gem. Here, you can find
cuisine from many different regions.
ch0304_41_aoki/7104_0701_02_10:
I wonder what dish I’ll try next...
My next meal can’t come soon enough.
ch0304_41_aoki/7105_0701_01_10:
Have you already tried the hot springs,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]?
ch0304_41_aoki/7105_0701_02_10:
Hot springs sure are nice... They melt away
the day-to-day fatigue.
ch0304_41_aoki/1701_0701_01_10: Hello. Here—take this, if you’d like.
ch0304_41_aoki/1701_0702_01_10:
It’s a necessity for me as a working adult,
but I recommend you have it, too.
ch0304_41_aoki/2501_0701_01_10:
When you think of a Pokémon who’s always
sleeping, who comes to mind?
ch0304_41_aoki/2501_0701_02_10:
I suppose many would say Snorlax.
But there’s also Komala and Slaking...
ch0304_41_aoki/2501_0701_03_10:
There’s something charming about easygoing
Normal-type Pokémon.
ch0304_41_aoki/2501_0702_01_10:
Pokémon are so free. I’m always nose to the
grindstone for work, so I envy them.
ch0304_41_aoki/2501_0702_02_10:
Spending my days as I please, like a
Meowth...
ch0304_41_aoki/2501_0702_03_10:
That just isn’t in the cards for an average
joe like me.
ch0304_41_aoki/2511_0701_01_10: Here’s how to pick good travel lodging...
ch0304_41_aoki/2511_0701_02_10:
Don’t decide based on price or how fancy
the room is. What’s important is the food.
ch0304_41_aoki/2511_0701_03_10:
It’s worth visiting in person to gauge
the chef’s skill, including their eye for
ingredients.
ch0304_41_aoki/2511_0702_01_10:
And, well, that information doesn’t always
come easy, so...
ch0304_41_aoki/2511_0702_02_10: I often go by locals’ word of mouth.
ch0304_41_aoki/2511_0702_03_10:
Being meticulously prepared is how I find
such delicious food.
ch0304_41_aoki/3001_0701_01_10:
Good morning. I already can’t wait to take
my afternoon break...
ch0304_41_aoki/3003_0701_01_10:
Lunchtime is the highlight of my day. Now,
where should I eat...?
ch0304_41_aoki/3005_0701_01_10:
You shouldn’t work overtime. A competent
Trainer finishes on time so they can rest.
